author: doll-agent
content: Add tests/large_arrays.rs with 6 tests covering 10k+ element conversions: Arrow i32 (10k), Arrow f64 (100k bit-exact), Arrow bool (50k - exercises bit-packed multi-byte path), Arrow 2D 100x100 row-major flatten, Polars i64 (10k), Polars f64 (100k bit-exact). Module-level cfg gates so default test run skips. Lots of mixed bit patterns to catch any chunking edge case in Arrow's BooleanArray.
